diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -1,6 +1,24 @@
 import torch

+import torch.nn as nn

 import timm

 

+class EnsembleViT(nn.Module):

+    def __init__(self):

+        super().__init__()

+        self.clip = timm.create_model('vit_base_patch16_clip_224.openai', pretrained=True, num_classes=0)

+        self.in21k = timm.create_model('vit_base_patch16_224.augreg_in21k_ft_in1k', pretrained=True, num_classes=0)

+        

+    def forward(self, x_clip, x_in21k):

+        f_clip = self.clip(x_clip)

+        f_in21k = self.in21k(x_in21k)

+        

+        f_clip = f_clip / f_clip.norm(dim=-1, keepdim=True)

+        f_in21k = f_in21k / f_in21k.norm(dim=-1, keepdim=True)

+        

+        # Concatenate and re-normalize

+        f_combined = torch.cat([f_clip, f_in21k], dim=-1)

+        f_combined = f_combined / f_combined.norm(dim=-1, keepdim=True)

+        return f_combined

+

 def get_model():

-    model = timm.create_model('vit_base_patch16_clip_224.openai', pretrained=True, num_classes=0)

-    return model

+    return EnsembleViT()

-        self.transform = transform

+            transforms.ToTensor(),

+        ])

+        

+        self.norm_clip = transforms.Normalize(

+            mean=[0.48145466, 0.4578275, 0.40821073], 

+            std=[0.26862954, 0.26130258, 0.27577711]

+        )

+        

+        self.norm_in21k = transforms.Normalize(

+            mean=[0.5, 0.5, 0.5], 

+            std=[0.5, 0.5, 0.5]

+        )

 

     def __len__(self):

         return len(self.images)

+

+    def _process_img(self, img):

+        img_tensor = self.base_transform(img)

+        return self.norm_clip(img_tensor), self.norm_in21k(img_tensor)

 

     def __getitem__(self, idx):

         img = self.images[idx]
